title: dalbergia mollis
intro: Dalbergia mollis, also known as the Philippine rosewood, is a species of flowering tree in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dalbergia mollis include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Dalbergia mollis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments.
